nodes.name: Upper Guinean forests
nodes.summary: The Upper Guinean forests is a tropical seasonal forest region of West Africa.

nodes.name: 下幾內亞森林
nodes.summary: 下幾內亞森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Congo serpent eagle，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Congo serpent eagle
nodes.summary: Congo serpent eagle（Congo serpent eagle，学名 Circaetus spectabilis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: spectabilis is found in upper Guinean forests from Liberia to northern Cameroon, while C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: batesi is found in lower Guinean forests from southern Cameroon through Gabon and western Uganda. Its range covers . The species lives in dense primary forest below in elevation in the dark understory. As it is adapted for dense forest, it is not well-adapted for secondary forests and plantations. The Congo serpent eagle does not migrate, though it is unknown if it is locally nomadic
